name: twitter-automation
description: Automate Twitter/X with posting, engagement, and user management via inference.sh CLI. Apps: x/post-tweet, x/post-create (with media), x/post-like, x/post-retweet, x/dm-send, x/user-follow. Capabilities: post tweets, schedule content, like posts, retweet, send DMs, follow users, get profiles. Use for: social media automation, content scheduling, engagement bots, audience growth, X API. Triggers: twitter api, x api, tweet automation, post to twitter, twitter bot, social media automation, x automation, tweet scheduler, twitter integration, post tweet, twitter post, x post, send tweet
capabilities: Post tweets with media images or videos
Get user profiles and tweet details
author: inference-sh-8
securitySummary: Static analysis flagged 48 potential issues, but evaluation reveals all are false positives. External command detections are markdown documentation examples, not actual execution. Network URLs are legitimate inference.sh service endpoints. The pipe-to-shell install method uses SHA-256 verification as documented mitigation. This is a standard Twitter API client skill with acceptable risk for marketplace publication.
valueStatement: Automate your Twitter/X workflow with posting, likes, retweets, DMs, and user following through the inference.sh CLI. Perfect for social media managers and content creators.
limitations: Requires inference.sh account and API credentials
Rate limits depend on Twitter/X API tier
Cannot schedule posts directly (must use external scheduling)

useCases.targetUser: Social media managers handling brand accounts
useCases.title: Social Media Manager
useCases.description: Automate posting content across multiple Twitter accounts, like competitor posts for engagement, and follow relevant users.

useCases.targetUser: Content creators using AI generation tools
useCases.title: Content Creator
useCases.description: Generate AI images or videos and automatically post them to Twitter with captions.

useCases.targetUser: Developers building social media automation tools
useCases.title: Developer Integrations
useCases.description: Build custom Twitter workflows by chaining the inference.sh CLI with other AI apps.

promptTemplates.title: Post Simple Tweet
promptTemplates.prompt: Use the twitter-automation skill to post a tweet that says: {tweet_text}

promptTemplates.title: Post Tweet with Image
promptTemplates.prompt: Use the twitter-automation skill to post a tweet with the image at {media_url} and caption: {caption}
promptTemplates.scenario: Posting a tweet with an image attachment

promptTemplates.title: Engage with Post
promptTemplates.prompt: Use the twitter-automation skill to like the tweet at {tweet_url} and then follow the author
promptTemplates.scenario: Liking a post and following the author

promptTemplates.title: AI Image to Twitter Workflow
promptTemplates.prompt: First generate an image using the falai/flux-dev-lora app with prompt: {image_prompt}, then use twitter-automation to post it with caption: {caption}
promptTemplates.scenario: Generating an AI image and posting to Twitter

bestPractices: Always review tweet text before posting to avoid typos or unintended content
Space out automated actions to respect Twitter rate limits
Use Twitter developer credentials with appropriate permission levels
antiPatterns: Do not use for spam or aggressive automated engagement that violates Twitter terms
Avoid posting the same content repeatedly without variation
Do not attempt to automate actions faster than rate limits allow

faq.question: Do I need a Twitter developer account?
faq.answer: Yes, you need to set up Twitter/X API credentials through inference.sh to use this skill.

faq.question: Can I schedule tweets in advance?
faq.answer: This skill posts immediately. For scheduling, use an external scheduler or cron job to trigger the post at desired times.

faq.question: Is this safe for business accounts?
faq.answer: Yes, when used within Twitter API rate limits and terms of service. Always review automated content before posting.

faq.question: What happens if Twitter rate limits me?
faq.answer: The API will return an error. Implement retry logic with exponential backoff or reduce automation frequency.

faq.question: Can I delete tweets with this skill?
faq.answer: Yes, use the x/post-delete app with the tweet_id to delete a tweet.

faq.question: Does this work with X Premium features?
faq.answer: Feature availability depends on your Twitter API tier. Basic posting works with free tier.
